queries.sql: select count(distinct `product_flat`.`product_id`) as aggregate from `product_flat` where `locale` = 'en' and `channel` = 'default' and `status` = 1 and `visible_individually` = 1 and not exists (select 1 from `seller_store_products` as `ssp` where `ssp`.`product_id` = `product_flat`.`product_id` and `ssp`.`seller_id` = 3)

select `product_flat`.`product_id`, `product_flat`.`sku`, `product_flat`.`name`, `product_flat`.`type`, `product_flat`.`status`, `product_flat`.`price`, `af`.`name` as `attribute_family`, COALESCE(SUM(product_inventories.qty), 0) as quantity, (SELECT pi.path FROM product_images pi WHERE pi.product_id = product_flat.product_id ORDER BY pi.position ASC, pi.id ASC LIMIT 1) as base_image from `product_flat` left join `attribute_families` as `af` on `product_flat`.`attribute_family_id` = `af`.`id` left join `product_inventories` on `product_flat`.`product_id` = `product_inventories`.`product_id` where `product_flat`.`locale` = 'en' and `product_flat`.`channel` = 'default' and `product_flat`.`status` = 1 and `product_flat`.`visible_individually` = 1 and not exists (select 1 from `seller_store_products` as `ssp` where `ssp`.`product_id` = `product_flat`.`product_id` and `ssp`.`seller_id` = 3) group by `product_flat`.`product_id`, `product_flat`.`sku`, `product_flat`.`name`, `product_flat`.`type`, `product_flat`.`status`, `product_flat`.`price`, `af`.`name` limit 10 offset 50
select count(*) as aggregate from `orders` where `seller_id` = 3 and `seller_approval_status` = 'approved'

select `product_flat`.`product_id`, `product_flat`.`sku`, `product_flat`.`name`, `product_flat`.`type`, `product_flat`.`status`, `product_flat`.`price`, `af`.`name` as `attribute_family`, COALESCE(SUM(product_inventories.qty), 0) as quantity, (SELECT pi.path FROM product_images pi WHERE pi.product_id = product_flat.product_id ORDER BY pi.position ASC, pi.id ASC LIMIT 1) as base_image from `product_flat` left join `attribute_families` as `af` on `product_flat`.`attribute_family_id` = `af`.`id` left join `product_inventories` on `product_flat`.`product_id` = `product_inventories`.`product_id` where `product_flat`.`locale` = 'en' and `product_flat`.`channel` = 'default' and `product_flat`.`status` = 1 and `product_flat`.`visible_individually` = 1 and not exists (select 1 from `seller_store_products` as `ssp` where `ssp`.`product_id` = `product_flat`.`product_id` and `ssp`.`seller_id` = 3) group by `product_flat`.`product_id`, `product_flat`.`sku`, `product_flat`.`name`, `product_flat`.`type`, `product_flat`.`status`, `product_flat`.`price`, `af`.`name` limit 10 offset 50
